hooks.command: file="$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$file" in */frontend/*.ts|*/frontend/*.tsx) cd frontend && npx eslint --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -5;; */backend/*.py) cd backend && source venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null; python3 -m py_compile "$file" 2>&1 && python3 -c 'from app.main import app' 2>&1 | tail -3;; esac

f="$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$f" in *.env|*.env.*) echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit env files'; exit 1;; */supabase/migrations/0[0-2][0-7]_*) echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit applied migrations (001-027). Create a new migration instead.'; exit 1;; esac; exit 0
